Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Joel Adler, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bullivant/Houser/Baile PC., Jess Mellickan, witness, present, was sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Victor Marquez, individually:
Principal $67,811.76
Interest $16,478.74
Costs $626.30 for a total of $84,916.80
Judgment signed in open court.
